pages.text: A luxurious ring elevated from an Exquisite Ring and the Pact of Infinite Avarice.$(br2)It answers wealth, trade, and gems, while making its bearer stand out to raiders.
pages.title: Ring of Ultimate Luxury

pages.text: When worn, the Ring of Ultimate Luxury grants 1 extra Fortune level.$(br2)Villager trades do not raise prices and do not run out of stock.$(br2)Merchants other than Piglins will not actively choose the bearer as a target.
pages.title: Luxurious Gains

pages.text: If the Pact of Infinite Avarice is worn at the same time, the block-drop Fortune bonus rises to 2 levels.$(br2)The bearer's outgoing damage then increases based on carried gems. More gems mean more damage, with diminishing returns.
pages.title: Pact Synergy

pages.text: Raiders will prioritize the bearer of the Ring of Ultimate Luxury.$(br2)When the ring is empowered by the Pact of Infinite Avarice, raiders also deal more damage to the bearer based on carried gems.
pages.title: Cost

pages.text: Craft the Ring of Ultimate Luxury from the Pact of Infinite Avarice and an Exquisite Ring.
